steps.title: Translate the situation
steps.content: Payment $p$ equals the original retail price minus 135 dollars for each year since release. The original retail price is 670 dollars and $t$ is the number of years.

steps.title: Check the model
steps.content: For $t = 1$, $p = 670 - 135 = 535$. For $t = 4$, $p = 670 - 540 = 130$. Both values are sensible within $1 \leq t \leq 4$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
The equation must keep $p$ on the left and subtract $135t$ from the starting price, 670.

That matches Choice B — $p = 670 - 135t$.
